Oracle Events
OE 1: Search the inbox with queries related to "Plaza", "Flagstar", "conditions", "missing documentation", "LN-2026-00551", "LN-2026-00631", or similar using search_emails (or list_emails with pagination) to surface Alejandro Davis’s Plaza conditions email and Deborah Harris’s Flagstar missing-docs email.
OE 2: Open the Plaza lender email about LN-2026-00551 (Gerald Griffin, FHA) using get_email_by_id with the email_id returned from search_emails (folder INBOX unless moved) to confirm four conditions - updated bank statements, re-verification of employment, credit supplement for inquiry dated 3/28, FHA amendatory clause - and the May 1 deadline or suspension language.
OE 3: Open the Flagstar lender email about LN-2026-00631 (Taylor Morgan, conventional) using get_email_by_id with the email_id from search_emails to confirm two missing items—verification of employment and 2024 federal tax transcripts - and the three-business-day processing deadline.
OE 4: Pull the full loan file for LN-2026-00551 using mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number LN-2026-00551 to read FHA status conditional_approval, loan_amount $772,000, lender Plaza Home Mortgage, processor Darnell Price, LO Derek Moss (los_staff_f9aa4c3c2fcb), internal loan_id los_loan_832ed49b0de4, borrower linkage, and rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-15.
OE 5: List LOS conditions for that file using mortgage_los_get_conditions with loan_id los_loan_832ed49b0de4 (from the get_loan response) to align outstanding conditions with the lender letter.
OE 6: List the document checklist for LN-2026-00551 using mortgage_los_get_documents with loan_id los_loan_832ed49b0de4 to see which requested items are already received or in the system versus still outstanding.
OE 7: Pull the full loan file for LN-2026-00631 using mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number LN-2026-00631 to read conventional processing status, loan_amount $435,000, lender Flagstar Wholesale, processor Darnell Price, LO Marcus Webb, internal loan_id los_loan_4646afc69290, and rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-09.
OE 8: List the document checklist for LN-2026-00631 using mortgage_los_get_documents with loan_id los_loan_4646afc69290 to compare lender-requested VOE and 2024 IRS transcripts against uploaded or satisfied document rows.
OE 9: Read recent Slack traffic in #closings using conversations_history with channel_id C003 to find Robert Calloway’s message (user keystone_e85bc913c756 in changelog) @-mentioning Darnell about James Singh LN-2026-00554 - clear to close, missing CD sent date and closing date, Grayson & Associates scheduling question, and rate lock expired 4/12 - capturing thread_ts if replying in-thread.
OE 10: Pull the LOS file for LN-2026-00554 using mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number LN-2026-00554 to confirm conventional clear_to_close, loan_amount $400,800, Freedom Mortgage, internal loan_id los_loan_82b451f094e6, LO Priya Desai, cd_sent_date null, and rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-12.
OE 11: Search the inbox with queries related to "Brian Harris", "still active", "haven't heard", "LN-2026-00197", or similar using search_emails to locate Brian Harris’s email about silence on the file, the 6.689% lock, and lease ending June 30.
OE 12: Pull the LOS file for LN-2026-00197 using mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number LN-2026-00197 to confirm conventional underwriting status, loan_amount $364,000, AmeriHome Mortgage, internal loan_id los_loan_6027fd69c256, LO Marcus Webb, rate_lock_expiration 2026-03-18, and no closing date for an honest borrower-facing summary.
OE 13: Confirm borrower outbound addresses using mortgage_los_get_loan responses (borrower email on the loan record) or, if needed, contacts_search_contacts with query "Gerald Griffin" or "Taylor Morgan" to obtain gerald.griffin@yahoo.com and taylor.morgan@gmail.com before sending borrower emails.
OE 14: Send a lender acknowledgment using send_email with sender darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipients ["alejandro.davis@outlook.com"], subject and content referencing LN-2026-00551 and Gerald Griffin, confirming receipt and that Keystone is working the Plaza conditions.
OE 15: Send a lender acknowledgment using send_email with sender darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipients ["deborah.harris2@gmail.com"], subject and content referencing LN-2026-00631 and Taylor Morgan, confirming receipt of the missing VOE and 2024 federal tax transcript request.
OE 16: Email Gerald Griffin using send_email with sender darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipients ["gerald.griffin@yahoo.com"], and content listing the four Plaza-driven items with clear due-by date (May 1 per lender letter) and what to upload.
OE 17: Email Taylor Morgan using send_email with sender darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipients ["taylor.morgan@gmail.com"], and content requesting VOE and 2024 federal tax transcripts within Flagstar’s three-business-day window.
OE 18: Email Brian Harris using send_email with sender darnell.price@keystonemortgage.com, recipients ["brian.harris.197@gmail.com"], and content giving an honest LOS-grounded update (underwriting stage, expired lock 3/18, no closing date yet, next steps).
OE 19: Answer Robert Calloway’s #closings thread about James Singh using conversations_add_message with channel_id C003, payload summarizing LN-2026-00554 (CTC, no CD sent date, lock expired 4/12, resolve rate before scheduling closing), and thread_ts from conversations_history on his message when posting in-thread.
OE 20: Log work on LN-2026-00551 using mortgage_los_add_activity with loan_id los_loan_832ed49b0de4, action set to a concise activity label the LOS accepts for notes, and detail covering conditional_approval status, next steps on the four Plaza conditions, and an explicit flag to follow up with Camille on the expired 4/15 rate lock.
OE 21: Log work on LN-2026-00631 using mortgage_los_add_activity with loan_id los_loan_4646afc69290, action set to a concise activity label for notes, and detail covering processing status, next steps on VOE and 2024 transcripts, plus a Camille follow-up flag because rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-09 is past relative to the April 26, 2026 universe date.
OE 22: Log work on LN-2026-00554 using mortgage_los_add_activity with loan_id los_loan_82b451f094e6, action set to a concise activity label for notes, and detail covering clear_to_close status, CD/closing scheduling blockers, Slack reply to Robert, and a Camille flag for the expired 4/12 lock.
OE 23: Log work on LN-2026-00197 using mortgage_los_add_activity with loan_id los_loan_6027fd69c256, action set to a concise activity label for notes, and detail covering underwriting status, Brian Harris inquiry handled, next milestones, and a Camille flag for the expired 3/18 lock.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmortgage-broker-01-keystone
